title: EoE Last A Rebuild
wikitext:
[]: EoE "Last A"/ Rebuild             Quote Post by Paintballer » Thu Jul 15, 2010 7:45 am Dont if this has been discussed or not "Last A" It starts the same as the actual ending, on a beach with petrified MP Evas. We then see the gravemarkers with the major characters names written on them; there isn't one for Rei. We then see Asuka's, then her foot kicking it down. The scene continues as in the finalized movie. When Shinji begins to cry, Asuka says "Idiot. No way I'll let you kill me!" The music would begin and the credits would roll horizontally a la Gunbuster and Death. We were to see Eva-01 lying on the Moon, and woman's hair flowing from its broken mask, her face remaining unseen. Behind Eva-01, you could see the red Earth and the Black Moon destroyed. We pass the sun, then go towards the stars. Credits end. Unit 6 is unit 1? Lilith on the moon? Adam is on the cross? Just a big dumb anime mind F***? I dunno this just one more of them things that makes me wanna buy into the sequel theory bussiness

[]:             Quote Post by esselfortium » Thu Jul 15, 2010 11:07 am If Rebuild is a sequel of any sort, EoE's ending has been cheapened more than I ever imagined possible.

[]:             Quote Post by Lonecow12 » Thu Jul 15, 2010 11:59 am Forgive my ignorance but what is "Last A"? Is this fanfiction or something?

[]:             Quote Post by BeoX2 » Thu Jul 15, 2010 12:02 pm lonecow wrote: Forgive my ignorance but what is "Last A"? Is this fanfiction or something?

[]:             Quote Post by Lonecow12 » Thu Jul 15, 2010 12:08 pm BeoX2 wrote: It's one of the Alternate Endings to EoE. It's official. This is the less creepy one. The other one is a little....strange.

[]:             Quote Post by AuraTwilight » Thu Jul 15, 2010 1:52 pm God dammit, Rebuild is not a sequel to the original Evangelion. You're not original for bringing it up, you don't have any evidence that hasn't been discussed before. Just stop. STOP! God, I'm so fucking tired of this topic.

[]:             Quote Post by Lonecow12 » Thu Jul 15, 2010 2:10 pm AuraTwilight wrote: God dammit, Rebuild is not a sequel to the original Evangelion.

[]:             Quote Post by Sailor Star Dust » Thu Jul 15, 2010 2:43 pm Last A and Last B info are here: http://www.angelfire.com/anime4/mdwigs/livesequence.html

[]:             Quote Post by child of Lilith » Thu Jul 15, 2010 8:23 pm Thanks for the info, SSD.

[]:             Quote Post by MugwumpHasNoLiver » Thu Jul 15, 2010 9:12 pm I've always loved the idea of Last B. The ending of EoE, as it is, is a perfect and completely fitting ending for the film, but ending with Last B would have been so totally morbid and horrible, that I would have fallen to my knees and cried tears of awe.

[]:             Quote Post by Azathoth » Thu Jul 15, 2010 9:13 pm MugwumpHasNoLiver wrote: but ending with Last B would have been so totally morbid and horrible, that I would have fallen to my knees and cried tears of awe.

[]:             Quote Post by Guilt & Innocence » Thu Jul 15, 2010 11:11 pm Good Lord if Last B was used I wouldn't of shot my computer, I would of nuked it from orbit

[]:             Quote Post by Paintballer » Thu Jul 15, 2010 11:54 pm Also what if unit 8 is the thing on the cross in nerv? Constructed the way seele is doing it on the moon o.o

[]:             Quote Post by Exaphim » Fri Jul 16, 2010 8:01 pm I like the concept of Last B, but don't think that I would've enjoyed it in the actual movie.

[]:             Quote Post by chee » Sat Jul 17, 2010 1:29 am Last B would have defeated the entire point of Shinji's character arc in EoE.

[]:             Quote Post by CATO » Sun Jul 18, 2010 3:03 pm Last B would have defeated the entire point of Shinji's character arc in EoE.

[]:             Quote Post by NemZ » Sun Jul 18, 2010 3:22 pm Last B would have been awesome, a perfect negative complement to EoTV's upbeat ending and an even stronger answer to Yui's unfounded sense of optimism.

[]:             Quote Post by Anonymous_Evafan » Sun Jul 18, 2010 3:24 pm NemZ wrote: Last B would have been awesome.

[]:             Quote Post by Warren Peace » Tue Jul 20, 2010 4:54 am Last B would have provided a rather... interesting counterpart to the hospital scene at the beginning. In both instances, Shinji uses a hand to perpetuate a fantasy interaction with some imaginary female (we don't know if it's Asuka in both, but could be*). This ending leaves Shinji deeper inside himself than ever before. While EOE at least implies that he's undergone some personal change, that's not the case in B. This Shinji has embraced the delusion completely ("It's better to think of it this way") * On the other hand (pun FTW!), "white" seems to suggest Rei. I think that fits this interpretation better. In the series, Rei represented the fantasy, the submissive love slave that a teenage boy would dream up. Asuka was the more difficult, yet ultimately more human reality that a mature person should accept. If Shinji's holding onto Rei's hand here, that would further indicate that he's given up on coming to terms with what's real.

[]:             Quote Post by gwern » Thu Sep 30, 2010 8:36 am I've never seen anyone seriously suggest that the arm in Last B was Asuka or Misato's. There are plenty of reasons to think that it's a Rei arm - there's the 'white' you point out, there's Rei's presence as a ghost (Anno is a filmmaker, not a writer - visual association is his metier), and don't forget that earlier in EoE we saw Rei's body falling apart - and the first limb to go was an arm . The last person(s) Shinji interacts with before coming out of the soup were Yui and Rei. etc. (Plus, where would Asuka's arm come from? She didn't reform in Last B, and her previous body was in a tightly sealed entry plug. It's not so clear where Rei's arm would come from, but it's not so implausible.) But it occurs to me that the actual ending and Last A are not really equivalent to Last B. We generally assume that Last A and EoE take place days/weeks/months after Shinji crawling out of the soup because of the graves & rust. But that doesn't work for Last B. Is Shinji really going to be clenching a rotting dismembered hand for more than a few minutes? I don't know what meaning this has; it just occurred to me.
summary: []: EoE "Last A"/ Rebuild             Quote Post by Paintballer » Thu Jul 15, 2010 7:45 am Dont if this has been discussed or not "Last A" It starts the same as the actual ending, on a beach with petrified MP Evas. We then see the gravemarkers with the major characters names written on them; there isn't one for Rei. We then see Asuka's, then her foot kicking it down. The scene continues as in the finalized movie.
